title: ElytraLunge
description: Allows you to lunge while flying with an elytra
body:
# ElytraLunge: Use Lunge even while flying with an Elytra
Are you annoyed of using a complicated tactic like shown in this video?
<iframe width="280" height="158" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9kkd3LDx3zE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This datapack is for you!

## What this DataPack does:
- I modified the `lunge.json`
 to change the lunge requirements, so you can now use the enchantment, **even while gliding**
- Yeah that's basically everything

## How to install
You can either install the Datapack (works with Vanilla) or the Mod which works for Fabric, Quilt, Forge and NeoForge. You may get a warning, which says that you are using experimental features. You can just ignore it
